name: Wakiru
summary: Personal AI assistant with persistent memory, built on LangGraph over the Codex CLI.
description: A LangGraph agent that drives the Codex CLI, with two-layer memory: conversation history through a SQLite checkpointer and long-term markdown notes recalled semantically via a local fastembed and sqlite-vec index. Durable facts are saved and forgotten automatically each turn, with no API key required.

name: omarmassfih.no
summary: This website — a zero-JavaScript static site built with Eleventy.
description: Deployed to GitHub Pages through GitHub Actions, with build-time syntax highlighting, light and dark themes, an Atom feed and full SEO metadata. No client-side JavaScript.

name: omarmassfih.no Backend
summary: FastAPI backend for notes, search and chat on omarmassfih.no.
description: Serves published notes from Turso, exposes cached note APIs and powers the notes chatbot with embeddings, retrieval and streamed answers through Vercel AI Gateway.

name: Fragments vs Flow
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline from my master's thesis.
description: Provider-agnostic pipeline where generation, embedding and evaluation can each run on watsonx, Azure OpenAI or OpenAI. Uses Docling for document extraction and RAGAS for evaluation metrics.

name: Keycloak Auth Proxy
summary: FastAPI-based authentication proxy that secures backend services with Keycloak.
description: Sits behind a reverse proxy such as Traefik, Nginx or Envoy, validates JWTs and introspects access tokens before forwarding requests, and routes dynamically via Kubernetes/OpenShift DNS. Fully asynchronous using httpx.

name: Asp Interpreter
summary: Interpreter for Asp, a mini-Python programming language, written in Java.
description: Built for the University of Oslo course IN2030. Covers the full interpretation pipeline — scanner, parser, expression evaluation and a complete interpreter handling functions, loops and conditionals.
